response.original_title: [[Support→Path™]] How Do I Cancel My EarthLink Account?
response.overview: If you can’t cancel online, contacting EarthLink support is the fastest method ❮866❯-❮396❯-❮8330❯-. A representative will help you cancel your account and confirm closure ❮866❯-❮396❯-❮8330❯-. Backup emails, files, and contacts from your EarthLink account ❮866❯-❮396❯-❮8330❯- Cancel any active subscriptions linked to EarthLink ❮866❯-❮396❯-❮8330❯- Check for outstanding bills or charges ❮866❯-❮396❯-❮8330❯- Transfer important accounts using your EarthLink email ❮866❯-❮396❯-❮8330❯- Once you cancel your EarthLink account, all associated services like email and internet access will stop ❮866❯-❮396❯-❮8330❯-. Your data may be permanently deleted and emails will no longer be received ❮866❯-❮396❯-❮8330❯-.
response.title: [[Support→Path™]] How Do I Cancel My EarthLink Account?
